Okay, let's talk about creating and delivering your actual seed product. So this basically comes down to five steps here. This is the overview. ## [06:03 - 09:04]

because that's the magic in the seed launch. So this is what a call will typically look like. It's an introduction. You tell people what you're going to cover and why it's important. If you're going to cover each one for the same amount of time, you're going to have 12 minutes per subtopic, because five times 12 minutes is equal to 60 minutes.
